results.title: The Aldine Virgil: First Book Printed in Italic Type
results.judge_reason: Directly documents the 1501 Aldine Virgil and Griffo's italic with ligatures, central to source-side mechanism.

results.title: The Aldine Italic (ILAB)
results.judge_reason: General Aldine italic history overview but lacks specifics on stress angle or ligatures.

results.title: Type Spaces: How Aldus Measured Text
results.judge_reason: Burnhill's implicit typographic measurement analysis directly supports the 'typographic norm' source claim.

results.title: Survey of Modern Handwriting Generation Models (2025)
results.judge_reason: Surveys handwriting generation models including transformers, relevant for novelty-claim baseline comparison.

results.title: ScriptViT: Vision Transformer-Based Personalized Handwriting Generation
results.judge_reason: ScriptViT uses style-encoder cross-attention from references, the exact baseline novelty claim contrasts against.

results.title: Handwritten Text Generation with Vision Transformer
results.judge_reason: VT-based handwriting generation cited in novelty claim as a baseline lacking global phase constraint.

results.title: Transformer-Based Handwriting Recognition Online+Offline Features (June 2025)
results.judge_reason: Handwriting recognition rather than generation; tangential to phase-coherence sampling mechanism.

results.title: Handwriting Transformers (HWT)
results.judge_reason: HWT directly cited in novelty claim as style-encoder cross-attention baseline without global phase constraint.
